sourcesContent:
const JourneyPage = () => (

🗺️ User Journey

How TechGear Store tracks and understands your shopping experience

{/* Journey flow */}
📍 Your Shopping Journey
{[ { step: 1, icon: '🔐', title: 'Sign Up / Login', desc: 'Create your account and start your secure session. All your activity is linked to your profile.' }, { step: 2, icon: '🛍️', title: 'Browse Products', desc: 'Explore 50+ tech products. Every product you view is recorded to understand your preferences.' }, { step: 3, icon: '🛒', title: 'Add to Cart', desc: 'Add items to your cart. Cart additions signal buying intent and help us recommend better products.' }, { step: 4, icon: '💳', title: 'Purchase', desc: 'Complete your order. Purchase data updates product performance metrics in real time.' }, ].map((s, i, arr) => (
{s.icon}
Step {s.step}
{s.title}

{s.desc}

{i < arr.length - 1 && (
→
)}
))}
{/* What is tracked */}
📊 What We Track
{[ ['👁️', 'Product Views', 'Every product page you open'], ['🛒', 'Cart Additions', 'Items added to your cart'], ['💳', 'Purchases', 'Completed order items with quantity'], ['📍', 'Session Data', 'Session start time and duration'], ].map(([ic, title, desc]) => (
{ic}
{title}
{desc}
))}
💡 Why We Track
{[ ['🎯', 'Better Recommendations', 'Understand your preferences to suggest relevant products'], ['📈', 'Improve Products', 'Identify popular and unpopular products to curate better inventory'], ['⚡', 'Faster Experience', 'Optimize the shopping flow based on real user behavior'], ['🔒', 'Your Privacy', 'Data is tied only to your account and never shared'], ].map(([ic, title, desc]) => (
{ic}
{title}
{desc}
))}
{/* About TechGear */}
🛒 About TechGear Store
{[ { icon: '🏪', title: 'What is TechGear?', text: 'TechGear Store is a premium e-commerce platform for technology products. We offer 50+ curated products across phones, laptops, gadgets, and accessories from 30+ global brands.' }, { icon: '📊', title: 'Smart Analytics', text: 'Behind every click is data. TechGear uses a full analytics pipeline — tracking events are stored in MongoDB and analyzed to help the admin make inventory decisions.' }, { icon: '🔍', title: 'Event-Based Tracking', text: 'Our system tracks discrete events: product_viewed, add_to_cart, and purchase. This gives a complete picture of the conversion funnel from discovery to purchase.' }, { icon: '💰', title: 'Business Impact', text: 'Analytics help identify which products are dead (no purchases) vs hot sellers. This allows the admin to optimize inventory, run promotions, and replace slow products.' }, ].map((p, i) => (
{p.icon}
{p.title}

{p.text}

))}
); export default JourneyPage;
